MELSubItem.Title: Left and Right System Quantity Indications

ListItem.Para: Associated reservoir level is verified normal before each departure.
Associated system pressure indication operates normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the associated system reservoir quantity level is normal before each departure. (AMM DDG 29-33-01).

ListItem.Para: Gain access to the associated system reservoir visual quantity gauge.
Verify the reservoir visual quantity gauge indicates in the green band.
Center system reservoir level is verified normal before each departure.
Center system pressure indication operates normally.
Reserve steering isolation system is considered inoperative.
Nose gear isolation system is considered inoperative.
Alternate gear extension isolation system is considered inoperative.
C1 EMP Selector AUTO position is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL items 29-11-03-01A, 29-11-04, 29-11-05 and 29-11-06.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the center system reservoir quantity level is normal before each departure. (AMM DDG 29-33-01).

ListItem.Para: Gain access to the center system reservoir visual quantity gauge.
Verify the center system reservoir visual quantity gauge indicates in the green band.
